schema.create_freight_logs: CREATE TABLE freight_logs ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, trip_date TEXT DEFAULT (date('now','localtime')), origin TEXT DEFAULT '', destination TEXT DEFAULT '', driver TEXT DEFAULT '', cargo TEXT DEFAULT '', consignor_phone TEXT DEFAULT '', weight REAL DEFAULT 0, unit_price REAL DEFAULT 0, toll REAL DEFAULT 0, fuel REAL DEFAULT 0, water REAL DEFAULT 0, fine REAL DEFAULT 0, other_expenses TEXT DEFAULT '[]', total_expense REAL DEFAULT 0, freight REAL DEFAULT 0, net_income REAL DEFAULT 0, created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')) )
schema.index_trip_date: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trip_date ON freight_logs(trip_date)
schema.index_driver: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_driver ON freight_logs(driver)

queries.select_last_log: SELECT * FROM freight_logs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
queries.update_log: UPDATE freight_logs SET trip_date = ?, origin = ?, destination = ?, driver = ?, cargo = ?, consignor_phone = ?, weight = ?, unit_price = ?, toll = ?, fuel = ?, water = ?, fine = ?, other_expenses = ?, total_expense = ?, freight = ?, net_income = ?, updated_at = datetime('now','localtime') WHERE id = ?
queries.stats_overview: SELECT COUNT(*) as trips, COALESCE(SUM(freight),0) as total_freight, COALESCE(SUM(net_income),0) as total_net, COALESCE(SUM(total_expense),0) as total_expense, COALESCE(AVG(net_income),0) as avg_net, COALESCE(SUM(toll),0) as total_toll, COALESCE(SUM(fuel),0) as total_fuel, COALESCE(SUM(water),0) as total_water, COALESCE(SUM(fine),0) as total_fine, COUNT(DISTINCT trip_date) as work_days, COUNT(DISTINCT driver) as driver_count FROM freight_logs WHERE
queries.stats_daily: SELECT trip_date, COUNT(*) as trips, COALESCE(SUM(freight),0) as freight, COALESCE(SUM(total_expense),0) as expense, COALESCE(SUM(net_income),0) as net FROM freight_logs WHERE
queries.stats_by_driver: SELECT driver, COUNT(*) as trips, COALESCE(SUM(freight),0) as freight, COALESCE(SUM(net_income),0) as net FROM freight_logs WHERE
queries.group_by_date: GROUP BY trip_date ORDER BY trip_date
queries.group_by_driver_limit: GROUP BY driver ORDER BY freight DESC LIMIT 10
queries.order_desc: ORDER BY trip_date DESC, id DESC
